  • weekly picks (Apr 3 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 Apr 3rd week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score :
    Unfold/Fold

    04/20

    1. s41467-026-72234-w Dynamic recruitment of CaMKII into SHANK3 phase-separated condensates tunes postsynaptic density remodeling during long-term potentiation (Nature Communications)

    2. s41567-026-03231-5 Optical excitations reshape the spin-wave spectrum in antiferromagnets (Nature Physics)

    3. s41567-026-03271-x Average topological phase in a disordered Rydberg atom array (Nature Physics)

    4. 2604.15394v1 Atomic-scale order enables high thermal boundary conductance at $\beta$-Ga$_2$O$_3$/4H-SiC interfaces (arXiv)

    5. 2604.15417v1 Ultrastrong Coupling Signatures in Photon Statistics from Terahertz Higgs-Polaritons (arXiv)

    6. 2604.15419v1 Singlet-only always-on gapless exchange (SAGE) spin qubits: Charge noise effects and two-qubit gates (arXiv)

    7. 2604.15433v1 The Phase Transitions in a $p$ spin Glass Model: A Numerical Study (arXiv)

    8. 2604.15481v1 Divergence of detachment forces in the finite Voronoi model (arXiv)

    9. 2604.15486v1 Device-area selection of memristive transport regimes in epitaxial $Hf_{0.5}Zr_{0.5}O_{2}$-based ferroelectric devices (arXiv)

    10. 2604.15491v1 Electronic Signature of Melting Onset in Polycrystalline Copper at Extreme Conditions (arXiv)

    11. 2604.15553v1 Hole concentrations in doped gray {\alpha}-Sn on InSb and CdTe measured with infrared ellipsometry (arXiv)

    12. 2604.15595v1 Exact Analysis of a One-Dimensional Yang-Gaudin Model with Two-Body Loss (arXiv)

    13. 2604.15608v1 Inelastic neutron scattering study on the AFM uniform spin-1/2 chain compound CuSb2O6 (arXiv)

    14. 2604.15635v1 Inductance Meets Memory in the Quantum Magnet Mn3Si2Te6 (arXiv)

    15. 2604.15639v1 Facet-dependent Chemical Kinetics Governed Growth of Twisted Graphene Layers with Pre-designed Angles (arXiv)

    16. 2604.15653v1 Growth of quantum dots by droplet etching epitaxy in molecular beam epitaxy: theory, practice, and review (arXiv)

    17. 2604.15684v1 Flat-band energy filtering in interacting systems: conditions for improving thermoelectric performances (arXiv)

    18. 2604.15692v1 Current-Induced Dynamics and Instability Pathways of Skyrmioniums in Chiral Magnets (arXiv)

    19. 2604.15700v1 Amplitudes of Hall field-induced resistance oscillations with a two-harmonic density of states (arXiv)

    20. 2604.15749v1 Extracting conformal data from finite-size tensor-network flow in critical two-dimensional classical models (arXiv)

    21. 2604.15773v1 Phase Transitions as the Breakdown of Statistical Indistinguishability (arXiv)

    22. 2604.15793v1 Persistence of large and gate-tunable anisotropic magnetoresistance in an atomically thin antiferromagnet (arXiv)

    23. 2604.15812v1 Direct Orientation Contrast Imaging of Anti-Phase Domains on III-V Materials Using Scanning Electron Microscopy (arXiv)

    24. 2604.15815v1 Coupled-channels method for the scattering hypervolume in ultracold atomic three-body collisions (arXiv)

    25. 2604.15826v1 General perturbative framework for kinetics of rare transitions in 1-dimensional active particle systems (arXiv)

    26. 2604.15852v1 Voids in liquids: peculiarities of molecular dynamics simulation of fluid systems (arXiv)

    27. 2604.15860v1 Phase behavior of thermoresponsive colloids drives re-entrant plasmon coupling (arXiv)

    28. 2604.15899v1 Experimentally-validated multi-slice simulation of electron diffraction patterns (arXiv)

    29. 2604.15906v1 Experimental quantification of electronic symmetry breaking through orbital hybridization phase (arXiv)

    30. 2604.15908v1 On the role of the slowest observable in one-dimensional Markov processes to construct quasi-exactly-solvable generators with $N=2$ explicit levels (arXiv)

    31. 2604.15924v1 Ultrafast Current Switching from Quantum Geometry in Semimetals (arXiv)

    32. 2604.15935v1 Antiferromagnetic Dimers in the Parent Phase of a Correlated Kagome Superconductor (arXiv)

    33. 2604.15942v1 Extension of the iterated perturbation theory at arbitrary fillings to nonequilibrium steady states (arXiv)

    34. 2604.15960v1 Identification and Structural Characterization of Twisted Atomically Thin Bilayer Materials by Deep Learning (arXiv)

    35. 2604.15969v1 Flash temperature in sliding contacts: comparing theory with experiments (arXiv)

    36. 2604.15976v1 Charge Density Wave Driven Topological Phase Transition in Vortices (arXiv)

    37. 2604.15981v1 Laser induced surface nitriding of niobium: phase evolution and superconducting behaviour (arXiv)

    38. 2604.15983v1 Observation of ring states in a delicate topological insulator (arXiv)

    39. 2604.15985v1 Machine Learning and Deep Learning in Quantum Materials: Symmetry, Topology, and the Rise of Altermagnets (arXiv)

    40. 2604.15999v1 Disambiguating electrical detection of magnetization dynamics in magnetic insulators (arXiv)

    41. 2604.16040v1 Discharge at the Microscale: Using Optical Tweezers to Observe Muon-Induced Discharges of a Levitated Microparticle in Air (arXiv)

    42. 2604.16048v1 Formation of photoinduced space-charge field during in-bulk domain creation by femtosecond NIR laser irradiation in MgO:LN crystals (arXiv)

    43. 2604.16063v1 Spinon shift current in a noncentrosymmetric quantum spin chain (arXiv)

    44. 2604.16102v1 Exact Steady State of a One-end Driven XXZ Spin Chain with Boundary Field (arXiv)

    45. 2604.16120v1 Laser-written reconfigurable energy landscapes and programmable Moir'e spin textures (arXiv)

    46. 2604.16137v1 Observation of Strong-to-Weak Spontaneous Symmetry Breaking in a Dephased Fermi Gas (arXiv)

    47. 2604.16152v1 Hopping-Mediated Charge Transport in Graphene Beyond the Ballistic Regime (arXiv)

    48. 2604.16185v1 Environmental Control of Self-Aligning Chiral Bristlebots (arXiv)

    49. 2604.16257v1 MF-toolkit: A High-Performance Python Library for Multifractal Analysis with Automated Crossover Detection, Source Identification and Application to Gravitational Waves Data (arXiv)

    51. 2604.16293v1 Fluctuating Pair Density Wave in Finite-temperature Phase Diagram of the $t$-$t^\prime$ Hubbard Model (arXiv)

    52. 2603.03702v2 Contribution of remote bands to orbital magnetization in twisted bilayer graphene (arXiv)

    53. 2604.15510v1 Magnetic domains stabilized by symmetry-protected zero modes (arXiv)

    54. 2604.15605v1 Deterministic multiphoton bundle emission via interference-interaction control (arXiv)

    55. 2604.15634v1 Dark solitons in nonlinear Su-Schrieffer-Heeger lattices (arXiv)

    56. 2604.15820v1 Hilbert Space Fragmentation and Gauge Symmetry (arXiv)

    57. 2604.15892v1 Host-guest co-amorphous structure revealed by the suppression of the first sharp diffraction peak in isotactic poly(4-methyl-1-pentene) (arXiv)

    58. 2604.15895v1 Digital Predistortion for Flux Control of Tunable Superconducting Qubits (arXiv)

    59. 2604.15971v1 A Modular Cryogenic Link for Microwave Quantum Communication Over Distances of Tens of Meters (arXiv)

    60. 2604.16015v1 Discovering quantum phenomena with Interpretable Machine Learning (arXiv)

    61. 2604.16144v1 Gravitationally induced wave-function collapse from dynamical bifurcation (arXiv)
